rulings.Case Title: OPHELIA ALVAREZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alt, For Summ. Adj. Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 18, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues. (1) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED: (A) DISCRIMINATION CLAIM: FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. CASTELLANOS DEPOSITION FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET "DISIREABLE QUALIFICATIONS". (B) REASONABLE ACCOMODATION, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. CASTELLANOS DEPOSITION TESTIMONY INDICATES THE SEARCH WAS LIMITED TO HEALTH CARE POSITIONS. (2) MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED ON RETALIATION. =(302/PJM/AP)
